brand_dna.category: Better-for-you snack bars for kids and families, sold in 36-pack boxes across four flavors.
brand_dna.core_belief: Minimalist, playful nutrition that lets families fuel their best selves: 'my son Henri & I created these delicious yet nutritious snacks for kids of all ages to help you fuel your dreams!'
proof_points: Free from top 11 allergens (peanut/nut, gluten, egg, dairy free); vegan and kosher
High in protein (7-8g) with no sugar added
brand_dna.positioning: The clean, school-safe alternative to ultra-processed bars: few recognizable ingredients vs '20+ ultra-processed ingredients'.

voice_pillars.name: Warm and Family-First
voice_pillars.desc: Speaks like a parent to parents, framing snacks as a shared family ritual.
voice_pillars.quote: Dear friends, my son Henri & I created these delicious yet nutritious snacks for kids of all ages

voice_pillars.name: Playful Optimism
voice_pillars.desc: Upbeat, encouraging tone that ties snacking to ambition and vibrant living.

voice_pillars.name: Minimalist Clarity
voice_pillars.desc: Leads with short, transparent ingredient and allergen facts over hype.

voice_pillars.name: Easy and Reassuring
voice_pillars.desc: Positions the product as a low-effort, worry-free choice for busy parents.

phrases: The on-the-go snack I've been looking for!
Clean ingredients, no added sugar, not too sweet, packed with protein
Sweet enough to help with a sweet tooth craving
delicious as well as being very nutritious

icp: Health-conscious parents who want a tasty, school-safe snack their kids will actually eat, made with few recognizable ingredients and no added sugar.

personas.name: Allergy-Aware Parent
personas.description: Packs school lunches and needs nut-free, allergen-safe snacks; moved by the 'free from top 11 allergens' and school-safe angle.

personas.name: Clean-Label Seeker
personas.description: Reads every label and distrusts ultra-processed bars; moved by '5-7 minimally processed ingredients' and no sugar added.

personas.name: Busy On-the-Go Snacker
personas.description: Wants a filling, protein-packed grab-and-go bite between tasks; moved by convenience and '7-8g protein'.

offers: Discovery box to try all flavors ($42.99)

allowed.claim: Free from top 11 allergens (peanut/nut, gluten, egg, dairy free), vegan, kosher

banned.why: Banned health claim - unsupported immunity claim not allowed for food.

banned.claim: Burns fat or aids weight loss
banned.why: Banned - implied disease/fat-burning claim with no evidence.

banned.claim: Treats or prevents any illness or condition
banned.why: Banned - disease-treatment claims are prohibited for food products.

banned.claim: Using 'clean' or 'natural' as a standalone headline claim
banned.why: Vague and risky; use specific label-backed facts like 'no sugar added' instead.

banned.claim: 'High protein' stated beyond the actual label value
banned.why: Nutrient-content claims must match the verified label (7-8g per bar).
